message:
fix(test-utils): properly serialize Error objects in logging data

- Error objects weren't being serialized properly when logged as data
  (JSON.stringify produces {} for Error instances)
- Now extracts name, message, and stack from Error objects
- Affected: createLoggingFetch and withStep error handling
- Added afterEach with vi.restoreAllMocks() for cleaner test cleanup
- Added 2 tests to verify error serialization works correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
